title: GTU Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for Assistant Professor Posts
description: The Gujarat Technological University (GTU) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Assistant Professor Post. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their M.Sc. and Ph.D. can apply for the GTU Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview.
